venue.name: 温哥华 BC Place 体育场

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Houssem Aouar (Algeria) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Rafik Belghali.

events.description: 侯赛姆·奥亚尔射门偏出。 拉菲克·贝尔加利参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Switzerland 1, Algeria 0. Breel Embolo (Switzerland) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Johan Manzambi following a fast break.
Riyad Mahrez (Algeria) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 里卡多·罗德里格斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Houssem Aouar (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Gregor Kobel (Switzerland). Assisted by Farès Chaïbi.

events.description: 侯赛姆·奥亚尔射正。 法雷斯·沙伊比参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Denis Zakaria (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Luca Zidane (Algeria). Assisted by Remo Freuler.

events.description: 丹尼斯·扎卡里亚射正。 雷莫·弗罗伊勒参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Johan Manzambi (Switzerland).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Rayan Aït-Nouri.

events.description: 易卜拉欣·马扎射门被封堵。 拉扬·阿伊特·努里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ramiz Zerrouki (Algeria).
Corner, Switzerland. Conceded by Rafik Belghali.
Attempt missed. Ricardo Rodríguez (Switzerland) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Manuel Akanji.

events.description: 里卡多·罗德里格斯射门偏出。 曼努埃尔·阿坎吉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

Rafik Belghali (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Rayan Aït-Nouri (Algeria).
Rayan Aït-Nouri (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Farès Chaïbi (Algeria).
Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Denis Zakaria (Switzerland) header from the centre of the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Rubén Vargas with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 丹尼斯·扎卡里亚射门偏出。 鲁本·巴尔加斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nabil Bentaleb (Algeria).

Corner, Algeria. Conceded by Ricardo Rodríguez.
Riyad Mahrez (Algeria) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt saved. Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Gregor Kobel (Switzerland). Assisted by Houssem Aouar.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比射正。 侯赛姆·奥亚尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Switzerland 2, Algeria 0. Dan Ndoye (Switzerland) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.

events.description: 丹·恩多耶破门。 比分 2-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) left footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Houssem Aouar.

events.description: 易卜拉欣·马扎射门偏出。 侯赛姆·奥亚尔参与进攻。

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

h2h.reason: 暂未找到两队的历史交锋记录

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

dongqiudiSource.emptyReason: 懂球帝全量球队赛历未列出此前直接交锋

metadata.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
